finding.title: VAT Control Account mismatch
finding.description: VAT control account is GBP 45,000 and VAT return is GBP 39,800.

evidence.calculation: VAT control account GBP 45,000 less VAT return GBP 39,800 equals GBP 5,200.

badExplanations: The VAT difference is likely caused by duplicate invoices in sales.
The issue is probably a payroll error affecting the VAT return.
